name: SUPER MARKET
developer: Spectacularly Obsolete Logic Operations: Glitchy Applications Marvelously Executed Shoddily
short_description: SUPER MARKET is a fun, silly game about shopping with superpowers, throwing items at friends, and racing to be the first to finish your shopping while the world around is gets crazier and crazier.
detailed_description:
SUPER MARKET is a fun, silly game about shopping with superpowers, throwing items at friends, and racing to be the first to finish your shopping while the world around is gets crazier and crazier.

Customise your character and get your shopping online with friends in the superhero online shopping mode.

SUPER MARKET is made by Spectacularly Obsolete Logic Operations: Glitchy Applications Marvelously Executed Shoddily. The safe place where it will be fun and break and breaking makes it more fun. We are a small independent Australian game studio making games that you can afford (Tough economy; Have fun and don't break the bank).

Features:

  • Customise Your character.

  • Go shopping.

  • Throw items at friends.

  • Get swoll with powerups.

  • May cause hate or love feelings.

  • Win! Or lose if you're not good enough.

  • Multiplayer. Great for lucky people who have friends. :'(
